title: chrysogonum procumbens
intro: Chrysogonum procumbens, also known as green adder's root or green dragon, is a flowering plant native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Chrysogonum procumbens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of administration.
